tactics.name: Reconnaissance
tactics.description: The adversary is trying to gather information about the ML system.

tactics.name: Resource Development
tactics.description: The adversary is trying to establish resources to support operations against the ML system.

tactics.name: Initial Access
tactics.description: The adversary is trying to gain access to the ML system.

tactics.name: ML Model Access
tactics.description: The adversary is trying to gain some level of access to the ML model.

tactics.name: Execution
tactics.description: The adversary is trying to run malicious code or manipulate the ML system.

tactics.name: Persistence
tactics.description: The adversary is trying to maintain their foothold in the ML system.

tactics.name: Defense Evasion
tactics.description: The adversary is trying to avoid being detected by the ML system's defenses.

tactics.name: Discovery
tactics.description: The adversary is trying to figure out details about the ML environment.

tactics.name: Collection
tactics.description: The adversary is trying to gather ML artifacts and data of interest.

tactics.name: ML Attack Staging
tactics.description: The adversary is leveraging knowledge of the ML system to stage an attack.

tactics.name: Exfiltration
tactics.description: The adversary is trying to steal ML artifacts or data from the system.

tactics.name: Impact
tactics.description: The adversary is trying to manipulate, interrupt, or destroy the ML system and its data.

techniques.name: Search for Victim's Publicly Available Research Materials
techniques.description: Search for information about the victim's ML models and datasets in publicly available research.

techniques.name: Search for Victim's Open Source ML Models
techniques.description: Search for victim's open source ML models that may reveal information about the target.

techniques.name: Search for Technical Blogs/Research
techniques.description: Search for publicly available technical blogs and research about victim's ML systems.

techniques.name: ML Supply Chain Compromise
techniques.description: Adversaries may manipulate products or delivery mechanisms of ML supply chain to compromise ML systems.

techniques.name: Acquire Public ML Artifacts
techniques.description: Adversaries may search and acquire publicly available ML artifacts to support operations.

techniques.name: Develop Adversarial ML Attacks
techniques.description: Adversaries may develop attacks specific to the target ML model.

techniques.name: Obtain Capabilities
techniques.description: Adversaries may obtain ML attack tools and frameworks.

techniques.name: Backdoor ML Model
techniques.description: Adversaries may implant a backdoor in an ML model that can be triggered by specific input patterns.

techniques.name: Publish Poisoned Datasets
techniques.description: Adversaries may publish poisoned datasets to compromise ML systems that use them.

techniques.name: Poison Training Data
techniques.description: Adversaries may poison training data to embed vulnerabilities or influence model behavior.

techniques.name: Exfiltration via ML Inference API
techniques.description: Adversaries may exfiltrate ML artifacts through the inference API by reconstructing training data or model parameters.

techniques.name: Exfiltration via Cyber Means
techniques.description: Adversaries may exfiltrate ML artifacts using traditional cyber exfiltration techniques.

techniques.name: Denial of ML Service
techniques.description: Adversaries may disrupt ML services through excessive queries, resource exhaustion, or model corruption.

techniques.name: Erode ML Model Integrity
techniques.description: Adversaries may degrade the ML model's performance through adversarial techniques.

techniques.name: Cost Harvesting
techniques.description: Adversaries may exploit ML services to generate excessive costs for the victim.

techniques.name: ML Artifact Collection
techniques.description: Adversaries may collect ML artifacts such as models, datasets, and configurations.

techniques.name: Data from Information Repositories
techniques.description: Adversaries may collect data from ML information repositories such as model registries and data stores.

techniques.name: ML Model Inference API Access
techniques.description: Adversaries may gain access to the ML model through an inference API.

techniques.name: Verify Attack
techniques.description: Adversaries may verify the effectiveness of their attack against the target ML system.

techniques.name: Craft Adversarial Data
techniques.description: Adversaries may craft adversarial examples to cause misclassification or other errors in the ML model.

techniques.name: Full ML Model Access
techniques.description: Adversaries may gain full access to the ML model including architecture, weights, and training data.

techniques.name: ML-Enabled Product or Service
techniques.description: Adversaries may gain initial access through ML-enabled products or services.

techniques.name: Discover ML Model Ontology
techniques.description: Adversaries may discover the ontology or taxonomy of the ML model to understand its structure.

techniques.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
techniques.description: Adversaries may exploit vulnerabilities in public-facing ML applications for initial access.

techniques.name: Command and Control via AI Agent
techniques.description: Adversaries may leverage AI agents to establish command and control channels.

techniques.name: LLM Prompt Injection
techniques.description: Adversaries may inject malicious instructions into LLM prompts to manipulate model behavior, bypass guardrails, or exfiltrate data.

techniques.name: Phishing via AI
techniques.description: Adversaries may use AI-generated content for phishing attacks.

techniques.name: Evade ML Model
techniques.description: Adversaries may craft inputs designed to evade the ML model's detection or classification.

techniques.name: LLM Jailbreak
techniques.description: Adversaries may bypass LLM safety guardrails to generate harmful, unethical, or policy-violating content.

techniques.name: Unsafe LLM Output Handling
techniques.description: Adversaries may exploit improper handling of LLM outputs to execute code or manipulate downstream systems.

techniques.name: LLM Meta Prompt Extraction
techniques.description: Adversaries may extract system prompts or meta instructions from LLMs.

techniques.name: LLM Data Leakage
techniques.description: Adversaries may extract sensitive training data or private information from LLM outputs.

mitigations.name: Restrict Number of ML Model Queries
Control Access to ML Models and Data at Rest
mitigations.name_ko: ML 모델·데이터 저장 시 접근 통제

mitigations.name: Control Access to ML Models and Data in Transit
mitigations.name_ko: ML 모델·데이터 전송 시 접근 통제
